title: Layered Architecture of a Secure Cloud Platform over Virtualized Data Centers
description: A visual breakdown of the key architectural layers that comprise a modern cloud platform, highlighting how virtualization enables resource pooling and how security is integrated at every level.
elements: Virtualization Hypervisor Layer (e.g., VMware, Hyper-V, KVM)
Security & Compliance Envelope (Encryption, IAM, Firewalls, Monitoring)
relationships: The Physical Infrastructure hosts the Virtualization Layer
The Virtualization Layer abstracts hardware into Resource Pools
The Cloud Management Platform orchestrates the Resource Pools
The Cloud Service Models are built on top of the managed resources
The Security & Compliance Envelope encapsulates and secures all other layers
